assertions.text: Identifies that the file is too long / has too many rules as the root cause
assertions.evidence: Opens with 'The Core Problem: Bloat' — 21 rules, useful rules diluted, 'The target is under 150 lines'

Table of rules to delete includes: 'Write clean readable code', 'Follow SOLID principles', 'Use dependency injection', 'Use meaningful variable names', 'Tests should follow AAA pattern', 'Use Optional'

assertions.text: Identifies non-obvious project-specific rules worth keeping
assertions.evidence: Explicitly keeps: Integration test PostgreSQL requirement ('project-specific thing Claude needs'), JPA-not-native-SQL, Flyway mentioned in revised CLAUDE.md

assertions.text: Recommends putting commands prominently or first
assertions.evidence: 'Commands are prominent: Claude looks for commands near the top. Burying mvn spring-boot:run in a flat list... meant it had equal weight with use meaningful variable names'

assertions.text: Provides either a revised shorter CLAUDE.md or explicit keep/delete/move guidance
assertions.evidence: Provides a full 28-line revised CLAUDE.md; also provides line-by-line audit table with Delete/Rewrite/Move categories

assertions.text: Mentions a target size or line count for CLAUDE.md
assertions.evidence: 'The target is under 150 lines for most projects'
